subject_line: NA Integrated · Week of May 25 — BL4 hold confirmed, Wonderlands re-announce shipped, Test of Time tracking above plan
headline: BL4 Mad Ellie SP1 surge hold confirmed; Wonderlands DLC re-announce shipped clean; Test of Time tracking above plan into D7.
narrative_arc: Two intentional holds (BL4 Phase 2, Mafia tranche) and one shipped recovery (Wonderlands re-announce) define the week. Test of Time continues to outperform on review score and CCU — that's the budget headroom that lets us hold the BL4 surge without dragging the portfolio. Next week is decision-heavy: Mafia $120K tranche call Jun 1, BL4 Phase 2 $180K surge call Jun 5.

wins_this_week.headline: Wonderlands DLC re-announce shipped clean
wins_this_week.detail: Marcus draft v2 signed off by Davide Fri AM; comms posted with Sentiment Defense framing. 1hr community ack window closed without escalation. 65K standalone-page wishlisters notified via Steam date-shift.

wins_this_week.headline: Civ VII Test of Time D7 retention 33.6% (target 30%)
wins_this_week.detail: Time-Tested Civs multiplayer premiere Thu landed 18K concurrent (PotatoMcWhiskey + ursagaming + Boesthius + Quill18). Review score 87% up 2pp WoW. Test of Time tail clearing every gate.

wins_this_week.headline: Mafia refresh concepts cleared Brand QA
wins_this_week.detail: Heaven's 3 refresh concepts cleared Brand QA Thu; ROAS readout packaged on MAF-1010 for Davide pre-read. Ready for Jun 1 GO/NO-GO.

wins_this_week.headline: Cohort fatigue post-mortem closed
wins_this_week.detail: TOC vs Mafia 2 launch creative comparison documented; findings feed the Mafia refresh recommendation. Pattern: paid CPI drift precedes ROAS decay by 2-3 weeks across the sustain catalog.

intentional_holds.headline: BL4 Mad Ellie SP1 Phase 2 paid surge on hold
intentional_holds.detail: D30 retention 9.8% vs 14% gate. Heaven Phase 2 pause-brief confirmed in writing Tue; no creative kickoff until Davide call Jun 5. Patch 1.2 D30 re-measure Jun 12. Top-of-funnel remains strong (1,840/day wishlist, 82% reviews) — this is a retention problem, not awareness.

decisions_made_this_week.what: Test of Time hero-cut handoff path
decisions_made_this_week.rationale: Chase Brand by EOD Tue, default to Open World v2 cut if not in hand. Brand delivered 6:42 PM; backup not needed.

decisions_open_into_next_week.what: Mafia TOC next $120K creative refresh tranche
decisions_open_into_next_week.alex_recommendation: GO — concepts cleared Brand QA, ROAS path is the right one. Recommend smaller pilot at $40K first 2 weeks before full tranche release.

decisions_open_into_next_week.what: BL4 Mad Ellie SP1 Phase 2 paid surge ($180K)
decisions_open_into_next_week.alex_recommendation: HOLD pending Patch 1.2 D30 re-measure Jun 12. Recommend re-spec around Whispering Glacier endgame window rather than spending into current cohort.

watch_items: Patch 1.2 ship-date confirmation for BL4 D30 re-measure window (Jun 12 target)
Heaven Media Q3 capacity check — 4 active title commits, BL4 Phase 2 + Mafia refresh + Wonderlands July re-time would push to 6 concurrent

asks_of_davide.ask: Final framing read on BL4 Mad Ellie SP1 Phase 2 surge pre-Jun 5 call
asks_of_davide.context: Want to walk into Jun 5 aligned on whether we're treating this as a hold-and-reload or a full re-spec of Phase 2 around the Whispering Glacier endgame window. My read is re-spec — happy to back into either.

asks_of_davide.ask: Approve $48K incremental for Civ VII Time-Tested Civs creator wave 2
asks_of_davide.context: Test of Time outperforming on every gate; recommend extending the creator program for a second wave to carry momentum into D30. Open World can produce by Jun 12. Funded out of Civ Q2 sustain underspend ($62K committed, $58.4K spent — $3.6K remaining).

themes_tracking_into_next_month: Portfolio-level creative fatigue across sustain campaigns. Mafia is the canary; BL4 Mad Ellie SP1 paid will need a fresh creative track ahead of Whispering Glacier window.
Heaven Media Q3 capacity. Currently 4 active title commits — checking bandwidth before stacking BL4 Phase 2 + Wonderlands July re-time + Mafia refresh concurrent execution.
Brand Creative bandwidth. Third asset slip in 4 weeks (CIV-1934 most recent). Worth a structural conversation on protected slot allocation before Q3 planning locks.
